title: Amauropelta acunae

Amauropelta acunae is native to Cuba and is a relatively rare species. It is a type of vascular plant that reproduces through spores, similar to other ferns. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally considered a member of the Thelypteridaceae family.
